overall.description: A first-person walk along a desert highway approach to a futuristic city (Night City from Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves steadily forward past red and white barriers, with sparse vehicle traffic on the right and a distant skyline of glass towers ahead. The scene transitions from open desert to passing beneath large highway billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway approach with distant futuristic city

events.description: first vehicle passes by on the highway to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt roadside parallel to the highway, heading toward the distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: car driving along the highway in the same direction as ego's movement

entered.detail: futuristic metropolis with tall glass towers visible on the horizon
multi-lane asphalt road with light traffic
desert vegetation scattered across the arid landscape
concrete barriers with red and white stripes lining the road edge
wooden power line poles running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert landscape with a futuristic city skyline visible in the far distance. The camera walks steadily forward along a dirt path beside a multi-lane highway, passing red and white concrete barriers. Sparse desert vegetation including Joshua trees dots the left side while vehicles occasionally pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach with large advertising billboards

events.description: large twin billboards become visible ahead, marking the entrance to the city area

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the roadside, approaching the large billboards that span across the highway

notable_agents.action: yellow van driving past on the highway

entered.detail: large highway billboard on metal framework showing advertisements
matching billboard structure on the right side of the highway
reddish rocky terrain and hills rising beside the highway

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues forward, two massive highway billboards come into view ahead, marking the gateway to the city. The desert landscape gives way to more rocky terrain on the right while the city skyline shifts to the left. Vehicles including a yellow van pass by on the highway as the camera approaches the billboard structures.

events.description: camera passes beneath the large billboards, transitioning to the other side of the highway marker

agents.ego_description: walking past the billboards and continuing along the roadside as the view opens up to show more of the highway ahead

entered.detail: closer view of the reddish rocky hillside terrain

segments.scene_description: The camera passes beneath the massive billboard structures, which recede behind and to the left. The view opens up to show the highway continuing forward into the rocky hills, with the city skyline now visible only as a distant feature on the left horizon. The red and white barriers continue along the left side as the road curves slightly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from an open desert expanse toward the looming gateway of a futuristic city. It begins on a dirt path beside a multi-lane highway, passing red and white concrete barriers while Joshua trees dot the landscape and sparse traffic flows to the right. As the camera advances, the terrain becomes rockier and two massive highway billboards emerge ahead, marking the transition as a yellow van passes by and the city skyline shifts toward the left. The scene then opens up as the camera passes beneath these towering structures, which recede into the distance. Finally, the view extends along the curving road and its continuing barriers, leaving the city skyline as a distant feature on the left horizon amidst the rocky hills.
